insight: In a set containing Vivid Drone and Chrono Filter, opening T1 Chrono Filter + Vivid Drone as P1 is a known line; P2 responded with Hellhound + Vivid on T2 in the referenced game. Despite wildly different openings, both players' board states converged to look similar later in the game, suggesting the set had a dominant mid-game configuration.
author: shadourow
context: Post-game discussion between shadourow and flakmaniak after a game featuring Vivid Drone, Chrono Filter, Manticore, Grenade Mech, and Hellhound.
